_comment: Bone mapping for retargeting NVIDIA Kimodo motion (SMPL-X / AMASS skeleton) onto the Shepa Jouer marshmallow rig. Source keys = SMPL-X body joint names (as named by the SMPL-X Blender add-on). Target values = our rig's bone names (assets/marshmallow_rigged.glb).
notes: SMPL 'collar' = clavicle -> our 'Shoulder' bones; SMPL 'shoulder' = upper arm -> our 'Arm' bones.
Hands/fingers from SMPL-X are ignored (our rig has no finger bones).
The root motion comes from SMPL-X 'pelvis' (trans + rot). Our game neutralises Hips X/Z drift for in-place clips via bodyPose() in character.js, so root translation is optional.
